overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting an art nouveau indoor corridor with glass and iron walls, featuring a view of a large pink cherry blossom tree through an archway. Two figures sit on benches while occasional pedestrians walk through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: art nouveau conservatory corridor with glass walls

events.description: pedestrian enters from top of stairs walking downward toward the camera

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the corridor from a fixed position at the entrance

notable_agents.action: sitting on the left bench facing the center corridor
sitting on the right bench facing the center corridor
walking down the stone stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: curved glass and green patina iron wall with vertical ribs
curved glass and green patina iron wall with circular window cutouts
large blooming pink tree visible through the archway at the top of the stairs
wide stone stairs with mossy edges leading up to the tree
intricate geometric patterned stone flooring with dark inlay
wooden bench with stone planter beside it
wooden bench with stone planter beside it

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stationary view of an art nouveau indoor corridor with green iron and glass walls. Two figures sit on benches flanking the walkway while a pedestrian descends the stone stairs from the direction of the large pink cherry blossom tree visible through the archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: art nouveau conservatory corridor with glass walls

events.description: second pedestrian enters from right side walking upward toward the tree

agents.ego_description: continuing stationary observation as pedestrians pass through the corridor

notable_agents.action: sitting on the left bench facing the center corridor
sitting on the right bench facing the center corridor
walking up the right side of the stairs away from the camera

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed as the corridor returns to its base state with the two seated figures. A second pedestrian enters from the right and walks up the stairs toward the pink tree, moving against the flow of the previous pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: art nouveau conservatory corridor with glass walls

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the empty corridor with only the seated figures present

notable_agents.action: sitting on the left bench facing the center corridor
sitting on the right bench facing the center corridor

segments.scene_description: The corridor returns to a quiet state with only the two seated figures remaining on their benches. The pink cherry blossom tree remains visible through the archway at the top of the stairs, and the warm mixed lighting continues to illuminate the art nouveau architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of an art nouveau indoor corridor that fluctuates between moments of pedestrian activity and quiet stillness. It begins with a view of green iron and glass walls where two figures sit on flanking benches as a pedestrian descends stone stairs from a large pink cherry blossom tree visible through an archway. As the first traveler departs, the scene shifts when a second pedestrian enters from the right and walks up the stairs toward the tree, moving in the opposite direction. The corridor then returns to a state of tranquility, leaving only the two seated figures amidst the architecture. Finally, the camera lingers on the empty walkway and the distant pink blossoms under a consistent glow of warm mixed lighting.
